introSection: Yippe is a steel launched roller coaster located at Parque del Café in Colombia. It contains both a lift hill and a launch, was manufactured by Gerstlauer and opened on 23 March 2018.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Yippe is a family launched roller coaster from Gerstlauer, similar in style to FireChaser Express at Dollywood and Pégase Express at Parc Astérix. The ride features dashing waterfalls that go off as the train passes by.

fullText:
Yippe is a steel launched roller coaster located at Parque del Café in Colombia. It contains both a lift hill and a launch, was manufactured by Gerstlauer and opened on 23 March 2018.

Yippe is a family launched roller coaster from Gerstlauer, similar in style to FireChaser Express at Dollywood and Pégase Express at Parc Astérix. The ride features dashing waterfalls that go off as the train passes by.
